CustomField.description: CPU Time usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c) || ISBLANK(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c) || AuditTransaction__r.LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c = 0, "N/A", IF(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.CpuTime.WorkItemRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.CpuTime.WorkItemAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c * 100, 1)) & "% of txn (" & TEXT(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c) & " ms)" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: CPU Time usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.label: CPU Time
